---
applyTo: "**"
---

# General Rules

These rules apply to all output generated by GitHub Copilot in this workspace.

- Never use em dashes (-) or en dashes (-) in any output. Use hyphens (-) instead.
- This is especially important in CSV and other data files where Unicode characters cause encoding issues in Excel.

## Documentation Style

- Write documentation to reflect current state only - no "previously this was done with X", "this replaces the old approach", or before/after comparisons.
- No historical context, migration notes, or changelog content unless explicitly asked for.
- Someone reading a doc for the first time should see clean, current instructions - not a record of how the project evolved.
- If history is needed, the user will ask for it separately.
